debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

failed_attempts:
h_conj.2
  rw [h_eq] at h
  simp [Exp.eval] at h
  have : bits2num args = (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 args) := rfl
  rw [this] at h
  clear this h_eq
  induction w with
  | zero =>
    simp_all [Vector.nil_eq, Nat.zero_eq, Nat.not_lt_zero]
  | succ w ih =>
    cases' args with hd tl
    simp_all [Vector.cons, assert_bits, Vector.all, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_succ]
    have : (tl.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0).val < 2 ^ w := by
      apply Nat.mod_lt
      apply Nat.pos_pow_of_pos
      norm_num
    omega

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have h₁ := h'.1
  have h₂ := h'.2
  rw [h₂] at h
  simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl] at h
  have : (bits2num args).val < 2 ^ w := by
    induction w with
    | zero => simp
    | succ w ih =>
      simp [Vector.cons, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left]
      omega
  omega

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h_conj
  cases' h_conj with h_bits h_eq
  rw [h_eq] at h
  have : (bits2num args).val < 2 ^ w := by
    induction w with
    | zero => simp [bits2num]
    | succ w ih =>
      simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl, Nat.pow_succ]
      have : (bits2num args.tail).val < 2 ^ w := ih
      have : args.head.val < 2 := by
        have : assert_bits args := h_bits
        unfold assert_bits at this
        simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] at this
        specialize this 0
        simp at this
        rcases this with h0 | h1 <;> simp [h0, h1]
      omega
  contradiction

by
    induction w with
    | zero => simp [bits2num]
    | succ w ih =>
      simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl, Nat.pow_succ]
      have : (bits2num args.tail : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := ih
      cases args.head with
      | mk a _ =>
        have : a.val < p := ZMod.val_lt _
        have : a = 0 ∨ a = 1 := by
          apply Or.intro_left
          exact Eq.refl _
          -- This is not necessarily true; we need to use assert_bits
        -- Instead, use assert_bits to know each bit is 0 or 1
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          have : assert_bits args = true := h₁
          unfold assert_bits at this
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or] at this
          specialize this 0 (by simp)
          tauto
        cases this with
        | inl h₃ =>
          simp [h₃]
          omega
        | inr h₃ =>
          simp [h₃]
          omega
  omega

  intro w args e h

    rw [←this] at hv
    have : v / 2 < 2 ^ w := by
      apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul
      · omega
      · omega
    exact ih _ this

    induction w with

            Vector.getElem_cons_zero] at this
          rcases this with h_head | h_head <;> simp [h_head]
        have : Vector.foldl (· + 2 * ·) 0 args.tail < 2 ^ w := ih (by
          unfold assert_bits
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, decide_eq_true_eq]
          intro i hi
          have : assert_bits args := h₁
          unfold assert_bits at this
          simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, decide_eq_true_eq] at this
          exact this (i + 1) (by simp [hi]))
        omega
      exact this
  omega

          intro i hi

  clear this

            simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,

        have : (xs.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0).val < 2 ^ w := ih (by
          unfold assert_bits at h₂_left

            Vector.getElem_cons_succ, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] at h₂_left
          exact h₂_left)
        omega
  omega

h₂_left
        simp [assert_bits] at h₆

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h_conj
  have h_range : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have h_bits : assert_bits args := h_conj.1
    have h_eq : e.eval = bits2num args := h_conj.2
    rw [h_eq]
    clear h_eq
    induction w with
    | zero => simp_all
    | succ w ih =>
      cases' args with hd tl
      simp_all [assert_bits, bits2num, Nat.pow_succ]
      have h_hd : hd = 0 ∨ hd = 1 := by
        simp_all [assert_bits]
      cases' h_hd with h_hd h_hd <;> simp_all [ZMod.val_zero, ZMod.val_one]
      all_goals
        omega
  contradiction

  rw [this] at h

    simp_all [Vector.cons, bits2num, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_succ]
    omega

        have : assert_bits args := h₂_left

        simp only [Vector.all_eq_true, beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, decide_eq_true_eq] at this
        specialize this 0 (by simp)
        cases' this with h | h <;> simp_all [ZMod.val_lt]
      omega
  omega
